channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Vinicius strikes twice as Real Madrid edge Atletico 3-2 in pulsating derby
item.description: Real stay within four points of league leaders Barcelona with hard-fought win in Madrid derby.

item.title: Who’s left running Iran?
item.description: Much of the top leadership has been eliminated, but the country is still fighting.

item.title: Displaced families shelter in tents in Beirut amid Israeli strikes
item.description: Families displaced by Israeli strikes are sheltering in tents across Beirut, as rain falls.

item.title: Israeli air strikes on Gaza kill four Palestinians
item.description: Strikes intensify across Gaza as health officials say 680 Palestinians have been killed since October's 'ceasefire'.

item.title: Israel vows to escalate campaign against Hezbollah in Lebanon
item.description: Israel says it will escalate operations against Hezbollah in Lebanon, targeting bridges over the Litani River.

item.title: Lebanon’s Aoun warns Israeli attack on bridge ‘prelude to ground invasion’
item.description: Israeli army chief says the operation against Hezbollah "has only begun" and would be "prolonged".

item.title: ‘We do it together, in confidence’: Netanyahu backs US strikes on Iran
item.description: Benjamin Netanyahu has vowed to back US strikes on Iran’s power grid if Tehran does not reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: ‘Risk of escalation is extremely high as Iran shows it can retaliate’
item.description: ‘The Iranians are indeed retaliating against everything that the Israelis and Americans are hitting’

item.title: Did Israel miscalculate Iranian military capabilities?
item.description: Iranian attacks on Arad and Dimona near Israeli nuclear site raise serious questions about Israel's defence strategy.

item.title: Iran claims missile attacks on key Israeli military bases
item.description: Iran says it launched multiple ballistic missile and drone strikes, targeting bases across Israel, UAE, and Kuwait.
